title: Crypto exchange Kraken is trying to become a bank in Europe
summary: Kraken's focus is on Lithuania as the jurisdiction to secure the license, according to a person familiar with the plans.

title: SpaceX IPO powers record $3.86 billion in tokenized equities trading in June
summary: SpaceX tokens captured $1.19 billion, or 31% of total monthly volume, with Backpack’s SPCX leading trading at $1.08 billion.

title: U.S. SEC to propose crypto rule as soon as this month to ease startups, fundraising
summary: A newly updated agenda from the securities regulator shows so-called Reg Crypto high on its near-term list.

title: Analysts see more upside for SpaceX as post-IPO research begins
summary: Major brokerages initiated coverage on Tuesday with mostly buy ratings following the company's $75 billion June IPO.

title: Vanguard opens search for digital assets leader in sign of evolving crypto strategy
summary: The new role would oversee tokenization, stablecoins and blockchain initiatives as Vanguard reassesses digital assets.
